title: Social and Economic Impact of Non-Communicable Diseases

summary.about: The social and economic burden of diabetes, depression, Alzheimer’s disease and hypertension in India, Mexico, the U.S. and globally.
summary.audience: Health ministries, public-health researchers and economic planners.
summary.method: Combines a thorough literature review with additional calculations and estimates, including demographic comparisons.
summary.insights: Non-communicable diseases create broad social and economic costs that vary by disease, country and population group.
